close_reason: Fixed. tk sync now regenerates all three deps files (go-deps.toml, rust-deps.toml, python-deps.toml) when their source files change.
description: Currently 'tk sync' only regenerates go-deps.toml. It should also regenerate python-deps.toml and rust-deps.toml when their respective source files (pyproject.toml, Cargo.lock) are present.
title: tk sync should regenerate all deps files, not just go-deps.toml
